greeting.text: The Choir hums on whether or not you're ready for it. Better that you are. Forge and pack are both open — what do you need?

repair.text: Bring your arms and armor and I'll repair, forge, or salvage them. No pilgrim of mine walks into that ossuary with a cracked breastplate.

wares.text: Healing and mana draughts, cure-potions, elixirs of vigor, food and light. LIST what I keep. The dead down there feel no hunger — you still do.

end.text: May the note pass you over.
